2025-10-12T18:08:04.2690806Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --global --add safe.directory /home/runner/work/devpool-directory/devpool-directory

2025-10-12T18:08:04.2765217Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'core\.sshCommand' && git config --local --unset-all 'core.sshCommand' || :"

2025-10-12T18:08:04.3016303Z http.https://github.com/.extraheader
2025-10-12T18:08:04.3030964Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --unset-all http.https://github.com/.extraheader
